body.text: in the following saying of 'Amr Ibn-Ahmar El-Báhilee means

A_i*aA maA AlHijaAziy~aAtu A^aEolaqona Tan~abato
                      
                     
                        bimayovaA='a laA yaA^oluwka raAfiDuhaA SaxoraA
When the women of El-Hijáz hang
their goods and utensils upon the trees,
they stretch their tent-ropes and pitch their tent in a soft tract of land, the thrower wherein will not be able to throw a large piece of stone at thee,
because of the not finding it. (O, L, K, * TA.)       -A2-  See also
